steps.name: validate_connection
steps.summary: Validate the configured Slack token and expose identity metadata.

steps.name: list_public_channels
steps.summary: List public channels visible to the current Slack token.

steps.name: list_users
steps.summary: List users visible to the current Slack token.

steps.name: select_user_target
steps.summary: Filter visible Slack users by query and select one canonical user target.

steps.name: select_channel_target
steps.summary: Filter visible Slack channels by query and select one canonical channel target.

steps.name: select_default_or_search_channel_target
steps.summary: Choose one configured default channel or fall back to a unified person/channel search.

steps.name: prepare_message_destination
steps.summary: Resolve the selected Slack user or channel target into the destination conversation used for posting.

steps.name: open_direct_message
steps.summary: Open or reuse a direct message conversation for the selected user target.

steps.name: prompt_message_body
steps.summary: Capture a multiline Slack message body for later posting.

steps.name: post_message
steps.summary: Post the prepared message to the selected Slack conversation.

steps.name: select_target
steps.summary: Search both users and channels and select one unified Slack target.

steps.name: ensure_target_conversation
steps.summary: Resolve a Slack conversation from the selected target.

steps.name: read_recent_messages
steps.summary: Read the most recent messages from the resolved Slack conversation.

steps.name: ai_summarize_messages
steps.summary: Summarize the retrieved Slack messages with AI.
